summary: This is an ultra-short humorous post written from the perspective of Joel's dog Taco, thanking TechSmith for sending pet photos and toys including an iPhone. It's essentially a playful thank-you note that serves as lighthearted filler content on the blog. The post has no substantive technical or business content.
key_points: A playful thank-you note written from the perspective of Joel's dog Taco
TechSmith apparently sent gifts and pet photos to Joel/Fog Creek
The humor comes from a dog writing a formal letter and claiming to enjoy an iPhone
key_insight: This is a whimsical non-technical post written as a joke letter from Joel's dog, with no substantive takeaway.
